name: nuzo
description: Local-first, auditable memory for Codex through Nuzo MCP tools.

interface.longDescription: Nuzo gives Codex a local, auditable memory layer backed by SQLite and exposed through MCP tools for remembering, recalling, listing, updating, forgetting, exporting, importing, and checking memory state.
defaultPrompt: Use Nuzo memory for stable project context.
Recall relevant local memories for this repo.
